hero.title: Spatial UI kit for premium product screens.
hero.description: A reusable component selection page for cards, controls, overlays, pseudo-3D previews and page sections. The route stays thin, reusable pieces stay in the correct Feature-Sliced layer and every surface follows the active theme.

layerMap.title: Every component has a layer.
layerMap.description: Shared primitives stay generic. UI-kit compositions live in entities. The final public page is assembled as a widget page-block.

shared.title: Primitives
shared.description: Buttons, cards, tabs, controls, badges, overlays and depth previews.

entities.title: Compositions
entities.description: Selected states, grouped examples and product-facing kit demonstrations.

widgets.title: Page assembly
widgets.description: Hero, layer map and showcase are composed into a ready public block.

app.title: Thin route
app.description: The Next.js route imports the block and avoids local business logic.

tokenSection.title: The page reuses the current Authora visual system.
tokenSection.description: These swatches are live CSS variables. Flip the header theme switch and the same UI kit resolves to the light or dark token set.

spatial-card.title: Spatial Card
spatial-card.description: Premium surface with hover lift, glow border, selected state and crisp radius.

hero-preview.title: Pseudo 3D Preview
hero-preview.description: CSS/SVG depth scene for hero blocks when no 3D dependency is allowed.

actions.title: Action Set
actions.description: Primary, secondary, ghost and icon actions with focus-visible and active states.

segment-tabs.title: Segment Tabs
segment-tabs.description: Accessible tablist for filters, modes and showcase navigation.

inputs.title: Control Stack
inputs.description: Input, toggle, range and progress primitives for dense tool surfaces.

overlay.title: Overlay Feedback
overlay.description: Modal and toast patterns for confirmations, previews and saved states.

entity-group.title: Entity Composition
entity-group.description: Domain-facing compositions group primitive parts without leaking into shared.

page-block.title: Page Block
page-block.description: Route-level assembly stays in widgets/page-blocks so app pages stay thin.

header.title: Choose the parts, then compose them by layer.
header.description: The selector demonstrates how neutral shared primitives become richer entity compositions without breaking the FSD dependency rule.

controls.title: Controls
controls.description: Local state changes the preview immediately.

motion.label: Motion
motion.hint: CSS-only animation, disabled under reduced motion.

compact.label: Compact density
compact.hint: Switches the same components into a tighter layout.

actions.title: Action cluster
actions.description: Buttons, icon buttons and state feedback share focus and hover behavior.

form.title: Form stack
form.description: Reusable controls for product, auth and admin surfaces.

select.title: Universal selector
select.description: One component supports single and multiple selection, removable values and adaptive menu placement.

layers.title: FSD map
layers.description: One-way imports keep the kit reusable.

composition.title: Composition
composition.description: Group selected states and demos in entities/ui-kit.

pageBlock.title: Page block
pageBlock.description: Assemble the public page in widgets/page-blocks.

route.title: Route
route.description: Keep the app route thin and predictable.

modal.title: Preview overlay
modal.description: This modal is opened from the UI kit entity and rendered by a shared primitive. It proves the overlay path without adding a new dependency.

toast.title: UI state updated
toast.description: The selected kit configuration is visible on the page.
